name: com.lihaj.comm-mapoca
description: Targeted multi-agent communication (TarMAC-style) for MA-POCA cooperative training in Unity ML-Agents. Provides a CommChannel message board with configurable topology (all-to-all or directed links), automatic CommBuffer sensor configuration, a CommAgent base class that broadcasts tanh-bounded messages from continuous action slots, and communication-flow gizmos. Pairs with the comm_mapoca Python trainer.
